Pan-Seared Salmon

AED 38.00

View Full Menu

A Legacy of Culinary Excellence

Our Story

For over two decades, Rickys Restaurant has been a cornerstone of fine dining in Dubai. Founded by Executive Chef Ricky Morales, our kitchen blends time-honored Middle Eastern culinary traditions with bold, contemporary flavors. Every dish tells a story — sourced from the finest regional farms and global purveyors, prepared with passion, and presented with artistry.

Learn More About Us

Exceptional Events

Catering Services

From intimate dinners to grand celebrations, let Rickys Restaurant bring our culinary excellence to your next event.

Private Events

Intimate gatherings to grand celebrations, curated to perfection with bespoke menus.

Corporate Dining

Impress clients and reward your team with world-class cuisine and impeccable service.

Wedding Catering

Make your special day unforgettable with our elegant, full-service wedding catering.

Plan Your Event

Guest Experiences

What Our Guests Say

“An extraordinary dining experience. The wagyu ribeye is simply the best I've had in Dubai. Every detail, from the ambiance to the plating, exudes sophistication.”
FAM

Fatima Al Maktoum

Food Critic, Gulf News

“Rickys has been our family's go-to for special occasions for years. The truffle pasta is divine, and the staff makes you feel like royalty every single visit.”
OAR

Omar Al Rashid

Regular Guest

“We entrusted Rickys with our catering for a DIFC gala and they exceeded every expectation. Outstanding flavors, and flawless service throughout the entire evening.”
LH

Layla Hassan

Wedding Planner

Join us for an evening of extraordinary cuisine, impeccable service, and the warm ambiance that has made Rickys Restaurant a Dubai institution.
